math_recheck: Re-derived and verified against the primary source (Touchette translation, Eqs 12b/24/27/29 + Thm 6) AND independently (sympy + Monte Carlo): Markov/Chernoff upper bound, Esscher-tilt+LLN lower bound, completing-the-square Gaussian integral, exponent cancellation with c0=γ3/6σ³ and c1=(σ²γ4−3γ3²)/24σ⁶, h-inversion series, α=hm̄−logR=Λ*(σc), b0=1/(hσ̄√2π), and Bernoulli Λ*=KL — all correct.
